slide1.title: Save Good Food, Save Money, and Fight Food Waste!
slide1.description: Discover surprise baskets of unsold food from local merchants at amazing discounts.

slide2.title: Surprise Baskets, Big Savings
slide2.description: Reserve mystery baskets with delicious items at up to -50% off. Contents vary daily based on what's available.

slide3.title: Near You, Easy Pickup
slide3.description: Find baskets from merchants nearby. Choose your pickup window and collect your surprise!

slide4.title: Pay on Pickup, Help the Planet
slide4.description: No online payment needed. Pay when you arrive and make a real impact against food waste.

profile.title: Profile
profile.restartRequired: The app needs to restart to apply the new language.
profile.faqContent:
Frequently Asked Questions

• How do I reserve a basket?
Browse available baskets, select one, choose quantity and pickup time, then confirm.

• What is a surprise basket?
A surprise basket contains a variety of unsold items from the merchant. Contents vary daily based on availability.

• How do pickup windows work?
Select a pickup time window that works for you. Arrive during that time to collect your basket.

• What payment methods are accepted?
Pay directly to the merchant when you pick up your basket (cash or card at the store).
profile.mission: Our mission is to fight food waste by connecting people with delicious surprise baskets from local merchants.
profile.motto: Because good food deserves a second chance
profile.availability: Available in Grand Tunis for launch
